name: New New Orleans Pasta
recipeIngredient: 1 pound chicken breast halves, cut into strips
1/2 pound Penne pasta, cooked al dente, tossed with oil
salt and freshly ground pepper -- to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saute pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add the chicken strips and chorizo sausage; cook, stirring often, until the chicken is browned and cooked through, about 5 minutes.
3. Stir in the chopped green onions, minced garlic, Tabasco sauce, and Worcestershire sauce to taste. Cook for an additional minute.
4. Add the heavy cream, grated Parmesan cheese, shrimp, and cooked Penne pasta. Toss gently to combine everything.
5. Simmer until all ingredients are heated through, about 2-3 minutes.
6. Season with Bayou Blast, salt, and pepper as desired.
7. Garnish with chopped green onions before serving.
